programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Shaun Quade's Pearl on the Ocean Floor
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now cook off in a pressure test to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Service Challenge: 50 Hungry Customers
programme.desc: The judges reveal that each contestant will be in charge of a dish to serve 50 hungry customers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Top 50 - Audition Dish
programme.desc: 50 contestants arrive and cook their best Audition Dish for the Judges in the hope of earning an apron.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Part 1: Invention Test & Part 2: George's Pressure Test
programme.desc: Just 10 aprons remain for the 18 remaining aspiring home cooks.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box - Past Champions Inspiring Future Champions
programme.desc: The top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for the very first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - First Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Three contestants choose a cloche containing a single ingredient to be used in a dish for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Final Round Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: With the Final Round of the Judge's Audition comes the First Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP761
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia Season 07

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Fish
programme.desc: The eight contestants from the losing team in yesterday's task must face off to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The contestants with the three least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants with the least impressive dish from previous invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Mexican Street Food
programme.desc: This episodes challenge is to cook Mexican street food for a huge crowd of 500 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The Queen of the Australian kitchen, Maggie Beer returns to the MasterChef Australia kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: In the invention test, the winner of the mystery box challenge will get to decide on the pantry items.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants will take part in a barbecue battle in the MasterChef Australia garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Childhood Memories
programme.desc: The contestants need to draw on childhood memories as an inspiration for their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from yesterday's challenge must cook-off to keep their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: The mystery box is revealed as today's challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Afternoon Tea at The Hotel Windsor
programme.desc: Two teams prepare afternoon tea for 100 guests at Melbourne's The Hotel Windsor.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Jaffle Irona
programme.desc: Today the three best-performing contestants in the invention test will compete for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: In an immunity challenge like no other, the two contestants will cook off against two professional chefs.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top five contestants enter the kitchen to face the last mystery box challenge.

programme.title: Immunity Challenge: Dan Hong
programme.desc: Ben battles against celebrity chef Dan Hong in the first immunity pin challenge of the season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopeful contestants compete for a place in the Top 50.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Mornington Peninsula Challenge
programme.desc: The top 12 performers from the Mystery Box challenge travel to the Mornington Peninsula.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Immunity Challenge 2
programme.desc: The 7 members of the winning team are vying for immunity, but there is a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 9
programme.desc: In a masterclass, Gary teaches the chefs how to poach an egg and glaze bacon.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: Filmed in front of a live audience, George cooks calf's liver and Gary cooks a sour cherry dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 4
programme.desc: Craig, Michael, Shannon and Rachel face a Heston Blumenthal creation: burger with chips and a milkshake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Blind Taste Test
programme.desc: The Blue Team are faced with two challenges: a Taste Test and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 9
programme.desc: As a reward, contestants Ellie and Alana are given another culinary lesson by the best chefs in New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - The Winner Announced
programme.desc: Kate and Michael continue to face off as the winner is finally announced.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook for up to 700 punters at one of Sydney’s busiest and largest pubs on a hot summer’s day.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 3
programme.desc: Contestants travel to Western Australia and the Sunrise Dam Gold Mine for a team challenge like no other.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 1
programme.desc: After winning the first challenge at MCK, Hayden faces off against apprentice chef Alex Keen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 3
programme.desc: Gary and George host a masterclass for the contestants on the art of cooking a great rabbit.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: Kate and Michael facee off in the Grand Finale, which consists of three challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 11
programme.desc: Famous MasterChef winner Eamon Sullivan challenges Dani to prepare his Chocolate Delice dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Day
programme.desc: After the boys lost the Short Order Offsite challenge, all 11 team members face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas Fine Dining Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants pair up and are asked to prepare one of eight courses of Neil Perry's QANTAS First Class menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 7
programme.desc: Mat, Billy and Hayden face off in a Pressure Test

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - EP80
programme.desc: The top four are given 135 minutes to reproduce Maggie Beer's Chook Terrine with various accompaniments.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Invention Test 2
programme.desc: The winners of the Team Challenge compete against each other at Margaret River's Clairault Winery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 9
programme.desc: Billy and Kate have two hours to recreate Katrina Kanetani's 'Autumn' dessert plate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Day
programme.desc: The winning Blue Team head off to their reward lunch at Jonah’s in Palm Beach.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 9
programme.desc: Chef Alessandro Pavoni challenges Dani to make a tray of sibas, squid soup, and tomato powder for immunity.

programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.
